authors: Stauss T, El Majdoub F, Sayed D, Surges G, Rosenberg WS, Kapural L, Bundschu R, Lalkhen A, Patel N, Gliner B, Subbaroyan J, Rotte A, Edgar DR, Bettag M, Maarouf M
title: A multicenter real-world review of 10 kHz SCS outcomes for treatment of chronic trunk and/or limb pain
journal_name: Annals of Clinical and Translational Neurology
study_question: Assess real-world effectiveness of 10 kHz HF-SCS for chronic trunk and/or limb pain.
population_assessed: 1660 patients trialed and/or permanently implanted with HF-SCS at 10 kHz
outcome_measures: Responder rate (≥50% pain relief) at 3, 6, 12 months and last visit; changes in pain intensity (VNRS), function, sleep, quality of life, and medication use.
inclusion_criteria: Patients trialed and/or permanently implanted with HF-SCS at 10 kHz between April 2014 and January 2018.
answer_to_study_question: HF-SCS at 10 kHz provided sustained ≥50% pain relief in over 70% of patients through 12 months, with last-visit responder rate 74.1%, and improvements in QoL, function, sleep, and reduced medication use; explant rate 3.7%.
